sections.paragraph:
χόρτασμα, ατος, τό (χορτάζω; Poly. et al.; pap, LXX, always of fodder for domesticated animals) food for humans, pl. (Diod S 19, 26, 2 χορτάσματα) Ac 7:11.—DELG s.v. χόρτος. M-M.

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

  1. pl. = plural

Diod Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1087
